ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the company operates in */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the company operates in */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the stock price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price, accounting for corporate actions */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the financial data belongs to */,
  "shares_outstanding" INTEGER /* Number of shares outstanding */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "pb_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-book ratio */,
  "cash_per_share" REAL /* Cash per share */,
  "net_cash_per_share" REAL /* Net cash per share */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "debt_to_equity_ratio" REAL /* Debt-to-equity ratio */,
  "roe" REAL /* Return on equity */,
  "roa" REAL /* Return on assets */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* End date of the company's fiscal year */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the financial data was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Total market value of companies in the sector */,
  "average_pe_ratio" REAL /* Average price-to-earnings ratio of companies in the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Total market value of companies in the industry */,
  "average_pe_ratio" REAL /* Average price-to-earnings ratio of companies in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the exchange */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Total market value of companies listed on the exchange */,
  "average_pe_ratio" REAL /* Average price-to-earnings ratio of companies listed on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the portfolio belongs to */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company in the portfolio */,
  "shares_owned" INTEGER /* Number of shares owned */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the shares were purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the shares based on the latest stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the news article is related to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "is_breaking" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the news is breaking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the watchlist belongs to */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company in the watchlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the company was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
